title: K3.b Context Envelope (provisional)
description: Provisional schema for v3.0-alpha. ZERO production consumers ship in v3.0-alpha; personas opt-in at v3.1 via `consumes_context_envelope: true` in their persona contract. v3.1 may amend without backward-compat guarantee — see ADR-0011 §K3.b for handshake protocol.

schemaVersion.description: v3.0-alpha ships 1.0.0-provisional. v3.1 consumers MUST reject envelopes whose schemaVersion does not start with '1.' (MAJOR-version handshake per ADR-0011 §K3.b).

contextItems.description: Ordered list of context items carried in K8's updatedInput payload. v3.0-alpha defines no item shape constraints (provisional); v3.1 will tighten via consumes_context_envelope opt-in.
